note: As-is baseline (before): the 0.7.0/0.8.0 board is a one-shot ship-picker — select ready-to-ship cards, s ships (separate-vs-merged asked afterwards in chat), q cancels; no view, no go, no filter; every non-ship outcome ends the board. Copied into the report bundle from charts/before/ (source: charts/before/current-board-shiponly.mmd); file path rewritten to the report/before/ location and renamed to the kind name flow.mmd so before/after pair by filename stem in the viewer.
